title: RF elements BR-WG2 Bracket for WaveAP Gen 2
category: RF elements / Wireless / Accessories / Mounting brackets
description: Smart bracket BR-WG2 provides additional mounting point to mount popular UI Wave AP Gen2 directly to RF elements Asymmetrical Horn Antenna . This provides slick and practical setup for Wave AP Gen2 when deployed with 90° RF elements Asymmetrical Horn. Once mounted, the Wave AP device can be aligned in azimuth and elevation together with Asymmetrical Horn antenna BR-WG2 is compatible with any RF elements Asymmetrical Horn Antenna that uses structural aluminum ring: the list includes the newest 6 GHz Wideband Horns, legacy 5 GHz AH-TP Series and any of our 4x4 Asymmetrical Horn antennas Despite the fact that BR-WG2 was designed specifically for UI Wave AP Gen2, it can be used for a wide range of various devices, such as 60 GHz APs, cameras, sensors , etc. This makes the BR-WG2 incredibly versatile mount Compatible 5 GHz Horn Antennas: 2 x 2 - AH90-TP, AH2030-TP, AH60-TP, AH20-CC, AH30-CC, AH60-CC, AH90-CC 4 x 4 - AH90-4x4-SMA, AH60-4x4-SMA Compatible 6 GHz Horn Antennas: 2 x 2 - AH90WB, AH60WB, AH45WB 4 x 4 - AH90WB-4x4-SMA, AH60WB-4x4-SMA BR-WG2 Bracket Mounting accessories
